charter: Continue governed execution until the goals in .planning/VISION.md are materially satisfied. Do not stop after isolated polish passes or internally consistent artifacts. PM must continuously generate the next concrete roadmap items needed to close the gap between current shipped state and the vision, and the run must keep executing them.
acceptance_contract: Core product engineering is prioritized ahead of docs and launch polish
PM continuously proposes new roadmap items tied to VISION.md gaps
the initiative does not stop while major vision gaps remain
